title: Armour Limiter
description:
This Datapack stops players from acquiring specific armours and tools.
Ever wanted to make your minecraft server difficult by disabling player from crafting certain armours?
I got you!!
body:
Ever wanted to make your minecraft server difficult by disabling player from crafting certain armours?
I got you!!
This Datapack stops players from acquiring specific armours and tools.

Usage:
After Installing the datapack, Follow the tips below to start the datapack:
1. Write "/Functions " and then press TAB to get the list of available commands.
2. Write "/Functions start_stop:start" to start the datapack, Now the datapack will start to clear every 
     armour and tools in your inventory
3. To prevent certain armours and tools from getting cleared, Type "/Functions stop:" and then press TAB, 
     By doing this you will get the list of all the armours and tools that you can filter out, and select the 
     armour/tool family that you dont want to get cleared.
4. If you cannot find your desired armour or tools family in the list then find it in the list given below and 
     paste it in the place of "<name>",   "/Function stop:<name>"

     List of the armour/tools family:

A.  netharmour
B.  nethtools
C.  diaarmour
D.  diatools
E.  goldarmour
F.  goldtools
G.  ironarmour
H.  irontools
I.    leatherarmour
J.   woodtools
K.  chainarmour
L.   stonetools
